title: Jagannath Temple, Chennai
tagline: Jagannath Temple, Chennai — spiritual town of Tamil Nadu

overview.short: Jagannath Temple is a Hindu temple dedicated in Chennai, Tamil Nadu, India.
overview.description: Jagannath Temple is a Hindu temple dedicated in Chennai, Tamil Nadu, India. The temple is dedicated to the divine trinity Jagannath, Baladeva and Subhadra. It is located in Kannathur off the East Coast Road on the Bay of Bengal coast. The temple is built in Kalinga architecture and the annual Rathyatra is the main festival celebrated in the temple.

topPlaces.name: Mayajaal
topPlaces.description: Mayajaal (literally, "phantasmagoria") is an entertainment centre in Kanathur, Chennai, India. It is located on the East Coast Road and spread over an area of 30 acres.

topPlaces.name: Academy of Maritime Education and Training
topPlaces.description: Academy of Maritime Education and Training (AMET) is a private Deemed university located in Chennai, Tamil Nadu, India. The institute is dedicated for maritime education and training.

image.alt: Academy of Maritime Education and Training

topPlaces.name: Semmencherry
topPlaces.description: Semmencherry is a neighbourhood in Chennai, Tamil Nadu, India. It is situated in Chennai district, located south of the city about 30 km from the city centre, along the Old Mahabalipuram Road a.k.a.

topPlaces.name: The Marina Mall Chennai
topPlaces.description: The Marina Mall Chennai (opened: 15 February 2019) is a shopping centre located in OMR Egattur in Chennai, Tamil Nadu, India. It is the largest shopping mall located in OMR. It opened its doors to the public on 15 February 2019; it has a 550,000 sq ft leasable space which includes more than 120 shops and services and includes parking with 1,200 parking lots for both cars and bikes.

topPlaces.name: Elite Grand Hotel
topPlaces.description: Elite Grand Hotel (formerly called Kohinoor Asiana Hotel) is a five-star hotel located on Old Mahabalipuram Road in Semmencherry, Chennai, India.

topPlaces.name: MGM Dizzee World
topPlaces.description: MGM Dizzee World is an amusement park located on East Coast Road in Chennai, Tamil Nadu, India. The park has 47 rides, including a log flume, a Ferris wheel, a roller coaster, and bumper cars.

topPlaces.name: Thalambur
topPlaces.description: Thalambur is a place which is located behind Navalur near Chennai. It is a pristine location for peaceful living.

topPlaces.name: SIPCOT IT Park
topPlaces.description: SIPCOT IT Park is an IT park located in Siruseri in the city of Chennai, along the IT Corridor, Chengalpattu District, India. It was developed on 782.51 acres (4 km2) of land by SIPCOT, the State Industries Promotion Corporation of Tamil Nadu, a fully government-owned institution.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Jagannath Temple, Chennai?
faq.a: The best time to visit Jagannath Temple, Chennai is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Jagannath Temple, Chennai?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Chennai International Airport (18 km) and the nearest railway station is Chennai Central (26 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Jagannath Temple, Chennai?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Jagannath Temple, Chennai at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Jagannath Temple, Chennai?
faq.a: Stays in Jagannath Temple, Chennai start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Jagannath Temple, Chennai?
faq.a: The top attractions are Mayajaal, Academy of Maritime Education and Training, Semmencherry, The Marina Mall Chennai, Elite Grand Hotel.
